# J-Life Kit

J-Life Kit is a browser-based set of tools for non-Japanese residents preparing for life in Japan.

Main site:
https://attwist.github.io/project_koru/

Useful pages:
- Japan move-in cost calculator: https://attwist.github.io/project_koru/move-in-cost.html
- Japan living cost calculator: https://attwist.github.io/project_koru/living-cost.html
- Japanese contract terms check: https://attwist.github.io/project_koru/contract-check.html
- Japan moving checklist: https://attwist.github.io/project_koru/moving-checklist.html

The app estimates costs and creates checklists or review prompts. It does not provide legal, tax, visa, or financial advice.
